parts_car_salvage_judgment: The repo is not a teardown. Keep the active product-home, BP priority, Point B, founder UI, deploy, receipt, and execution-truth machinery as the parts car. Retire or archive duplicate authority, stale completion semantics, and history-owned runners from active decision paths.

assets.reason: This is the current canonical product authority chain and directly solves amendment-first sprawl.
assets.risk: Generated reports can lag registry truth if not refreshed.

assets.reason: BP_PRIORITY is the only active queue and must remain. Existing helper still treats TECHNICAL_PASS as complete in getActiveProductItem.
required_remediation: Wire shared completion semantics helper.
Expose TECHNICAL_PASS_ONLY and POINT_B_COMPLETE as separate states.
Keep Voice Rail scrapped item outside active queue.

assets.reason: Point B lock is explicit and correct. Some downstream progress/runner behavior still lets machine path or TECHNICAL_PASS look stronger than founder closure.
required_remediation: Completion helper must make founder_usability_pass false block Point B complete.
Navigator summaries must always say awaiting founder confirmation when true.
Point B gate must feed scheduler status and readiness surfaces.

assets.reason: Useful-work guard and founder_stop handling are valuable. Current queueHasIncompleteWork can false-green when all items are TECHNICAL_PASS but Point B founder pass is false.
required_remediation: Replace local queueHasIncompleteWork with shared completion helper.
healthy idle requires Point B complete or founder_stop.
Update @ssot tag away from amendment-era primary authority.

assets.reason: Correct canonical runner idea and foundation loop connection. Current isComplete stops at TECHNICAL_PASS/PASS.
required_remediation: Replace isComplete with shared completion semantics.
For Point B, continue or return founder_usability_check until founder pass or founder_stop.
Do not spawn acceptance as closure when founder pass is missing.

assets.reason: The founder path is real and valuable. It already has async jobs, live CSS proof, autopsies, and scoped patchers. PASS can still leak without full transport/deploy proof in some paths.
required_remediation: Apply transport proof helper to all PASS mapping.
For already_present cases, return SKIPPED_ALREADY_VALID with proof, not build PASS.
Persist job result only after completion authority grants PASS.
Founder-visible reply must say COMMIT_ONLY_NOT_LIVE when deploy is stale.

assets.reason: Strong existing anti-theater gate: rejects missing SHA, stubs, layer violations, scope misses, and emits autopsies.
required_remediation: Replace commit-only PASS with transport-proof-aware states.
Do not let deploy_warning coexist with PASS when live proof is required.
Require origin/main evidence for code-changing founder/build PASS.

assets.reason: PB authority, receipt writing, memory, and telemetry are useful. EXECUTOR_MAX_ATTEMPTS=2 is weaker than founder doctrine.
required_remediation: Adopt three-attempt repair doctrine.
Require prior lessons and local code truth fields.
Add research+consensus escalation before higher tier.
Do not silently stop on repairable failures.

assets.reason: Quorum escalation is aligned with doctrine, but must be normalized under one repair doctrine helper and transport proof.
required_remediation: Ensure three-attempt pattern and lessons carry-forward are visible in all receipts.
Consensus/research context must be explicit after repeated failure.

assets.reason: Good SNT/Wisdom/CFO proposal generator, currently advisory. It must become enforceable deltas without creating a queue.
required_remediation: P0 proposals block healthy idle until resolved/parked/attached to BP delta.
Emit blueprint_delta and acceptance_delta fields.
Reference BP_PRIORITY only, never secondary queue.

assets.reason: Playwright founder-like path is valuable. It currently misses exact founder-specific prompt failures and can accept generic green.
required_remediation: Load founder-surface regression corpus.
Bind receipt to deploy SHA and corpus version.
Fail on fake display/overview routing for founder factual questions.

assets.reason: Good direct founder-interface API battery. Build probes can record final PASS without exposing commit/origin/deploy proof.
required_remediation: Require polled PASS payload to include transport_proof.
Fail final PASS if commit_sha absent.
Add exact founder prompt regression cases.

assets.reason: Useful aggregator. Current fresh receipt reuse is based on mtime and can say ready_for_founder_alpha while Point B is still incomplete.
required_remediation: Freshness must include deploy SHA and corpus version.
Expose point_b_complete=false when founder pass false.
CLEARED_FOR_FOUNDER_ALPHA cannot be interpreted as Point B PASS.

assets.reason: Correctly distinguishes ready_for_alpha_testing from ready_for_alpha_gate, but must be enforced everywhere else.
required_remediation: Require downstream gates to preserve ready_for_alpha_gate=false until founder pass.
Bind live_e2e and deploy SHA to freshness.

assets.reason: Deploy verification already knows runtime SHA parity is stronger than local success. It needs to be mandatory for PASS where live proof is required.
required_remediation: Expose transport proof object reusable by execution truth and acceptance.
No --allow-stale path for closure PASS.
Receipt latest Railway deployment id/status/log tail on failure.

assets.reason: Strong choke point for acceptance, OBJECTIVE_VERDICT, and BP sync. Needs reality_sync and Point B distinction.
required_remediation: Receipt PASS requires reality_sync.applied_paths.
Do not let technical acceptance set founder_usability_pass.
Guardrails detect Point B false complete.

assets.reason: Generated report concept is useful. Existing artifact is stale relative to PRODUCT_REGISTRY count and must not be treated as current without regeneration.
required_remediation: Include registry_hash, bp_priority_hash, point_b_hash, generated_from_count.
Mark stale=true when source hashes differ.
Closure acceptance fails on stale report.

assets.reason: Honest current certification already keeps FULLY_MACHINE_READY false and same-tier determinism false.
required_remediation: Add closure-specific proof requirements before any future upgrade.
Verifier blocks premature true flags.

assets.reason: AGENTS.md says Hist owns legacy queue/overnight artifacts. They may be read for lessons but not active product orchestration.
required_remediation: Keep Hist banners and guardrails.
Do not import these paths from active scheduler or closure acceptance.

assets.reason: Authority boundaries say CONTENT is snapshot/salvage, not runtime authority.
required_remediation: Use only through blueprint-defined copy steps.
Require HISTORY_SNAPSHOT header where amendment @ssot appears.

assets.reason: Operator lock says Voice Rail is scrapped salvage only. STT/TTS/wake-word patterns may be parts-car salvage, but product lane is not active.
required_remediation: No active queue entry.
No runtime authority claim from Voice Rail receipts.
Salvage patterns only through LifeOS/Chair blueprint when explicitly needed.

assets.reason: Useful parts-car inventory, but draft and dated. Must not override current audit or live probes.
required_remediation: Mark as structural inventory, not current truth.
Refresh after closure acceptance with deploy SHA and source hashes.

assets.reason: Deliberation governance assets are valuable but HANDOFF says wired, not shipped, with commit/deploy/Neon/Railway verification gaps.
required_remediation: Use as governance parts only after commit/deploy/runtime proof.
Do not count as shipped maturity until live receipts pass.

assets.reason: The alias is conceptually useful, but the referenced script was not present during inspection.
required_remediation: Create script that calls founder confirm path or remove alias from active proof surface.
Closure verifier must detect missing npm script targets.
